title: 5PCS 3.7V 400mAh Lithium Battery with 5 in 1 Charger for H99W H31 H6C H98 AT-96 TR-C385 TR-P51 TR-F22Quadcopter Spare Parts Drone Battery
features: Compatibility: This 3.7V 1000mAh Lipo battery is suitable for E88 E88PRO E88MAX E525 E99 E99PRO P1 P5PRO K3 S1 P8 BD101 P15 P15PRO LS-S1S V88 E99max P8 a13 a15 k6max k9max k10max k12max k706 k708 s1s RC quadcopters. RC drones.
Protection: The battery has a built-in protection mechanism to ensure its safe use and charging. This feature guarantees the battery's durability, making it a reliable choice for your equipment.
High-quality materials: The battery is made from high-quality materials, ensuring its excellent quality and long-lasting use.
Size and Weight: The battery size is 72*29*12mm（2.83*1.14*0.48in）and weight is 28g/1PCS.
Packing List：3PCS Battery + 1PCS USB Charging Cable.
